site_analysis_review.anti_bot_details: No anti-bot protection detected. CAPTCHA is configured but only for paymentInitiate and storeCard actions. Probe succeeded with browser_none, no proxy needed. Forter fraud detection is present but only for checkout, not browsing.
corrections: Site analysis correctly identified Localised Inc. platform - confirmed via metadata-v2.json and window.$VERSION in SPA shell
Site analysis correctly noted that direct HTTP returns empty SPA shell with no SSR - confirmed by web_fetch returning 5266 chars of boilerplate HTML only
Site analysis correctly identified Algolia as primary data source - confirmed via metadata-v2.json integrations.algolia section
No JSON-LD structured data exists on the page - all product data is loaded client-side via React/Algolia
No Open Graph tags populated - og:title, og:description, og:image are all empty strings in the SPA shell

connectivity.notes: Localised Inc. React SPA requires full JS rendering. Direct HTTP returns empty shell. Playwright with no proxy loads the page successfully. The SPA fetches product data via Algolia Search API after client-side session creation. No anti-bot challenges encountered.

algolia_search.notes: Algolia public search API key is embedded in metadata-v2.json. Product codes (objectIDs) can be extracted from URLs. Direct GET by objectID is the fastest extraction method. Requires headers: X-Algolia-Application-Id and X-Algolia-API-Key.

dom_extraction.wait_strategy: Wait for network idle after page load, then wait for product heading to appear
dom_extraction.notes: DOM extraction requires full Playwright render. React SPA loads product data asynchronously via Algolia after session creation. The ProductProvider React context supplies product data to all PDP components.

network_interception.notes: The SPA calls Algolia Search API during page load. Intercepting these network requests yields structured JSON product data. More reliable than DOM scraping but requires monitoring network traffic.

url.notes: Use window.location.href from the browser context, or construct from product code.

status_code.notes: Set by scraper from HTTP response

examples: AE Standard Fit Johnny Collar Knit Polo Shirt
title.notes: Product name. In DOM, the h1 is inside .ae-pdp-mobile div per CSS rules (.ae-pdp-mobile h1 { margin-bottom: -3.5rem }). CSS confirms h1 elements exist on PDP pages. Algolia 'name' field is the most reliable source.

price.notes: Current selling price. CSS explicitly defines [data-testid='currentPrice'] { font-weight: 600 }. Algolia index should have a price field. Currency is AUD (A$) per metadata-v2.json.

original_price.notes: Compare-at / was price. CSS defines [data-testid='percetangeOff'] for percentage off display. The original price is typically a sibling of this element. CSS has --colorOriginalPrice and --colorSale variables.

currency.notes: Fixed currency from metadata-v2.json: currency.code = 'AUD', currency.symbol = 'A$', pricingStrategy = 'FIXED_PRICE'

availability.js_extraction: const addToCartBtn = document.querySelector('.button--primary'); const isDisabled = addToCartBtn?.classList.contains('disabled'); return isDisabled ? 'Out of Stock' : 'In Stock';
availability.notes: CSS shows .button--primary.disabled { background-color: var(--greyLight); color: var(--dynamicPrimaryColor); cursor: pointer }. Disabled add-to-cart button indicates out of stock. Algolia should have availableForPurchase boolean per SKU.

brand.notes: Brand is American Eagle for all products on this site. The React context stores brand data (e.details.product.brand). Algolia index likely has brand.name field.

category.notes: Category hierarchy. Algolia typically stores categories as arrays of {name, level} objects.

images.notes: Product images. CSS references .ae-pdp-gallery .ControlTrack__controlTrack and .AspectRatio__container for image components. The React code shows image ratio comes from variant configuration.

description.notes: Product description. Localised Inc. uses HtmlText__htmlText component class for rich text blocks. SectionLabel__section wraps PDP content sections.

sku.notes: Product code / SKU from URL. Format: {style_id}_{color_id}_{sku_id}. Also available as Algolia objectID.

color.notes: Selected color variant. Color swatches use .Swatches__wrapper with aria-pressed attributes per CSS. The URL also contains ?color parameter.

variants_colors.js_extraction: Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.Swatches__swatchSet button')).map(btn => ({ label: btn.textContent.trim(), value: btn.getAttribute('name'), selected: btn.getAttribute('aria-pressed') === 'true' }))
variants_colors.notes: Available color variants. CSS shows .Swatches__wrapper pattern. Each swatch is a button with style__chip class and chip styling (border-radius: 25px, height: 4rem). CSS has ProductCard__title ~ .Swatches__swatchSet rule for PLP.

variants_sizes.js_extraction: Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.button--size-select, .button--main-size-select')).map(btn => ({ label: btn.textContent.trim(), value: btn.getAttribute('value') || btn.getAttribute('name'), disabled: btn.classList.contains('disabled') }));
variants_sizes.notes: Available size variants. CSS shows .button--size-select and .button--main-size-select for size buttons. Disabled state: .button--main-size-select.disabled { background-color: #d6d6d6; color: white }. Selected state: .button--main-size-select.selected { background-color: rgb(36,39,42); color: white }.

rating.notes: BazaarVoice reviews are DISABLED in metadata (bazaarvoice.active: false) and Yotpo is also disabled (yotpo.enabled: false). No ratings/reviews available.

location.notes: No warehouse/store location info displayed on PDP. Shipping is from Hong Kong per metadata (returns.address).

jsonld_extraction.notes: No JSON-LD structured data found. The Localised Inc. React SPA does not inject JSON-LD into the server-rendered HTML shell. All meta tags (og:title, og:description, og:image) are empty strings in the HTML.

color_swatches.notes: Color swatches are buttons with chip styling. aria-pressed indicates selection. aria-disabled indicates unavailable colors.

size_selector.notes: Size buttons use selectable button styling. .selected class for chosen size. .disabled class for out-of-stock sizes.

variant_data_changes.price: May change per variant (different SKUs can have different prices)

algolia_extraction_plan.notes: Algolia API key is a public search-only key embedded in the site metadata. Direct GET by objectID (product code) should return the full product record. This is the most efficient extraction method as it avoids the need for browser rendering, session creation, and network interception.

mechanism_reassessment.justification: The Algolia Search API provides a public, authenticated (via API key in metadata), direct HTTP endpoint for product data. Since the product code (objectID) can be extracted from URLs, a simple HTTP GET to Algolia returns structured JSON without needing browser rendering. This is faster, more reliable, and less resource-intensive than Playwright DOM scraping. Fall back to Playwright only if Algolia lookup fails. The site has NO anti-bot protection for browsing (only for checkout CAPTCHA).
mechanism_reassessment.strategy: 1) Extract product code from URL, 2) HTTP GET to Algolia API, 3) Parse JSON response for all fields, 4) Fall back to Playwright DOM extraction if Algolia fails

confidence_notes: Medium-high confidence. Platform, connectivity, and extraction methods are well understood. Algolia API credentials are confirmed from metadata-v2.json. CSS selectors are derived from actual stylesheet analysis. However, specific Algolia response fields are inferred from platform conventions rather than directly observed (Algolia GET requires POST-style headers which web_fetch couldn't send, and browser was unavailable to test). DOM selectors are untested due to browser unavailability. The mechanism reassessment to Algolia-first is strong but needs verification that the public API key allows GET-by-objectID lookups.
